title: Monday Custom Integration With Infusionsoft
excerpt:

posts.author: outsourced (Celine Callander)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

Our company uses Monday quite extensively and we’re wanting to integrate it with our CRM; Infusionsoft. This is already an option through Zapier, however it’s quite a basic integration and lacks certain functionalities we require.

For example, we need column updates in Monday to tag contacts and update custom fields in Infusionsoft.

We’re therefore looking for assistance with a custom integration.
If any Monday community members can assist on this, please reach out!

posts.author: Renae-JTsCloud (Renae-upstream)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

my team and I work on quite a few custom integrations and would be happy to help you set this one up too.

Shoot me an email at renae@jtscloud.com and we can set up a time to learn more about what you’re hoping to achieve.

posts.author: Constacloud (Tehziba Rizvi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, Celine.

Did you get the assistance you required for the custom integration?
If not, please contact us at sales@constacloud.com. We have over ten years of experience creating the most “customized and flexible” integrations, and as a result of this expertise, we are partnered with major companies who use our services as an ADD ON to their native projects, as we can support customized requests that arise from their native connections, as well as they are using us their “INTEGRATION PARTNER”.

Looking forward to hearing from you, thanks!

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Celine

Welcome to the community! monday.com integration with Infusionsoft helps you efficiently handle all your leads, customer associations, sales pipeline, and activities in one place so you can concentrate on closing the deals and not other things around. This integration also helps you to customize the interface in order to fit your sales workflow.

If you’re looking to integrate both these platforms, collaborating with the skilled monday.com consultants is the right choice. They can help you set up the integration, and the right templates, and manage every task from a single interface.
